source.description: A reviewed six-panel handmade marker process contact sheet.
source.notes: One consistent face-free retro comic ray gun angled from lower left to upper right on warm off-white paper, with a barrel, flared muzzle, grip, trigger guard, knobs, action rays, and sparks; no hand, character, target, lettering, logo, sticker outline, badge frame, decorative border, realistic firearm styling, or extra weapon.

process_strategy: The sequence locks one barrel axis, body block, flared-muzzle ellipses, grip wedge, trigger-guard reserve, two knob footprints, and action-ray zone; wraps those guides with the complete ray-gun silhouette; adds the trigger, panel seams, coils, knobs, muzzle rings, action rays, sparks, highlights, and shadow; then inks and colors only those established shapes before final cleanup.

final_elements.name: barrel axis, body block, flared-muzzle ellipses, grip wedge, trigger-guard reserve, two knob footprints, and action-ray zone
final_elements.description: Light construction fixes one chunky retro ray gun on a diagonal, including reserved spaces for its controls and comic energy marks.

final_elements.name: retro ray-gun silhouette with barrel, flared muzzle, rounded body, angled grip, trigger guard, and rear cap
final_elements.description: A bold outer contour turns the guides into a clearly fictional space-age prop at one locked angle.

final_elements.name: curved trigger, two control knobs, three body seams, two barrel coils, and double muzzle rings
final_elements.description: Specific interior hardware gives the fictional tool structure without realistic firearm detail.

final_elements.name: two tapered action rays, three small sparks, white highlight gaps, and violet ground shadow
final_elements.description: A compact burst, three sparks, planned highlights, and one shadow create comic motion without words or a scene.

final_elements.name: thick black outline with cyan, raspberry, yellow, cool-gray, and violet marker fills
final_elements.description: Visible felt-tip texture separates the established body, barrel, muzzle, grip, controls, action marks, and shadow.

frames.visible_job: Places the barrel axis, body block, flared-muzzle ellipses, grip wedge, trigger-guard reserve, two knob footprints, and action-ray zone at one fixed scale.
introduces: barrel axis, body block, flared-muzzle ellipses, grip wedge, trigger-guard reserve, two knob footprints, and action-ray zone

frames.visible_job: Wraps the guides with the barrel, flared muzzle, rounded body, angled grip, trigger guard, and rear cap while preserving the diagonal pose.
introduces: retro ray-gun silhouette with barrel, flared muzzle, rounded body, angled grip, trigger guard, and rear cap
requires_prior_elements: barrel axis, body block, flared-muzzle ellipses, grip wedge, trigger-guard reserve, two knob footprints, and action-ray zone

frames.visible_job: Adds the curved trigger, two control knobs, three body seams, two barrel coils, and double muzzle rings inside the completed silhouette.
introduces: curved trigger, two control knobs, three body seams, two barrel coils, and double muzzle rings
requires_prior_elements: retro ray-gun silhouette with barrel, flared muzzle, rounded body, angled grip, trigger guard, and rear cap

frames.visible_job: Adds two tapered action rays, exactly three small sparks, narrow highlight gaps, and one violet ground-shadow shape around the established prop.
introduces: two tapered action rays, three small sparks, white highlight gaps, and violet ground shadow
requires_prior_elements: retro ray-gun silhouette with barrel, flared muzzle, rounded body, angled grip, trigger guard, and rear cap
curved trigger, two control knobs, three body seams, two barrel coils, and double muzzle rings

frames.step_name: Ink and color the ray gun
frames.visible_job: Thickens every established contour and fills the body, barrel, muzzle, grip, controls, action rays, sparks, and shadow with directional marker strokes.
introduces: thick black outline with cyan, raspberry, yellow, cool-gray, and violet marker fills
requires_prior_elements: retro ray-gun silhouette with barrel, flared muzzle, rounded body, angled grip, trigger guard, and rear cap
curved trigger, two control knobs, three body seams, two barrel coils, and double muzzle rings
two tapered action rays, three small sparks, white highlight gaps, and violet ground shadow

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthens the established silhouette, trigger, controls, seams, coils, muzzle rings, two action rays, three sparks, marker fills, highlights, and shadow.
allowed_changes: small highlight clarification on established body and muzzle shapes

rejection_checks: No barrel, muzzle, body, grip, trigger guard, trigger, knob, seam, coil, ring, action ray, spark, color area, highlight, or shadow may first appear in the final panel.
The ray gun must retain one diagonal pose, barrel angle, body proportion, grip position, muzzle size, scale, and crop across every frame.
Keep the prop face-free and clearly fictional; reject realistic firearm anatomy, hands, characters, targets, or scenes.
Reject lettering, logos, extra weapons, sticker outlines, badge frames, or decorative borders.
Reject glossy vector icon art, smooth digital gradients, mechanically perfect geometry, poster lighting, or clean 3D-rendered plastic and metal.
